tiers.label: Metal Standard
tiers.subtitle: Vic West Ameri-Cana ribbed steel — exposed-fastener panels installed over existing roof. Synthetic underlayment + drip / ridge / hip caps. Strapping and redeck priced separately.

tiers.label: Metal Enhanced
tiers.subtitle: Same Vic West Ameri-Cana ribbed steel panels as Standard, but with full tear-off, deck inspection, peel-and-stick deck seal, and premium high-temp underlayment for full waterproofing. Steeper-pitch install premium included.

tiers.label: Metal Premium
tiers.subtitle: Full tear-off, deck seal, premium underlayment, Grace Ice & Water full deck, then Vic West snap-lock concealed-fastener panels (NOT standing seam — no machine roll-forming, no mechanical seams). Steeper-pitch install premium included. Redecking priced separately if needed.

tiers.label: Gold Package
tiers.subtitle: CertainTeed Landmark architectural shingles + synthetic underlayment + I&W at eaves/valleys. Pitch-fee priced for 8/12 hipped roof.

tiers.label: Platinum Package
tiers.subtitle: CertainTeed Landmark Pro Max Def + Grace I&W + Roof Runner premium synthetic. Pitch-fee priced for 8/12 hipped roof.

tiers.label: Diamond Package
tiers.subtitle: CertainTeed Presidential Shake — designer profile, 4 bundles/SQ, premium underlayment. Pitch-fee priced for 8/12 hipped + designer-install premium.

wall_assembly.label: Wall Assembly
wall_assembly.subtitle: 1/2" OSB substrate + Tyvek house wrap + 1.5" EPS foam + VentiGrid rainscreen + 1×3 strapping + window flashing detail.

tiers.label: Roof-Only Project
tiers.subtitle: Best if your siding is staying as-is and the priority is protecting the home from the top down.

tiers.label: Standard Vinyl
tiers.subtitle: Quality vinyl lap siding · low maintenance · clean modern profile.

tiers.label: Sequoia Premium
tiers.subtitle: Gentek Sequoia 4" Premium Select lap · upgraded color depth + extended warranty.

tiers.label: Cedar Shake (Designer)
tiers.subtitle: CertainTeed WoodShade vinyl shake · cedar profile, 50-yr fade warranty, no maintenance.

trim_gutters.label: Gutters
trim_gutters.subtitle: 6" continuous aluminum, hidden hangers, downspouts, color-matched. ~148 LF wrapping main + porch.

trim_soffit.label: Soffit
trim_soffit.subtitle: Vented aluminum soffit on full perimeter. Matches roofline.

trim_fascia.label: Fascia
trim_fascia.subtitle: Capped aluminum fascia, color-matched. Covers existing wood — no future maintenance.

prep_strap.label: Strap deck
prep_strap.subtitle: New 1×3 wood strapping over existing deck. Required for ribbed metal panels (Vic West Americana). Optional for standing seam (can go direct-to-deck if substrate is sound).

prep_redeck.label: Full OSB redeck
prep_redeck.subtitle: Tear off + replace deck with new 7/16" OSB sheathing. Optional — only needed if existing deck is rotting, soft, or otherwise compromised. Includes disposal.
